memberdef.name: NUM_OF_PING_REQ_PKTS
memberdef.initializer: 10 /* Number of ping req it generates */

memberdef.name: ARP_REQUEST
memberdef.initializer: 0x01 /* ARP Request bits in Rx packet */

memberdef.name: ICMP_PKT_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 0x4A /* ICMP packet length 74 Bytes including Src and dest MAC Add */

memberdef.name: NUM_RX_PACK_CHECK_REQ
memberdef.initializer: 10 /* Max num of Rx pack to be checked before sending another request */

memberdef.name: NUM_PACK_CHECK_RX_PACK
memberdef.initializer: 8000000 /* Max number of pack to be checked before to identify a Rx packet */

memberdef.name: IP_REQ_SRC_IP_LOC
memberdef.initializer: 13 /* Src IP add loc of ICMP req */

memberdef.name: IP_REQ_DEST_IP_LOC
memberdef.initializer: 15 /* Dest IP add loc of ICMP req */

memberdef.name: ICMP_DATA_LOC
memberdef.initializer: 19 /* ICMP data loc including identifier number and sequence number */

memberdef.name: ARP_REQ_SRC_IP_LOC
memberdef.initializer: 14 /* Src IP add loc of ARP req Packet */

briefdescription.para: The entry point for the AxiEthernet driver to ping request example in polled mode.

detaileddescription.para: This function will generate specified number of request packets as defined in "NUM_OF_PING_REQ_PKTS.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the AxiEthernet component.
is a pointer to the instance of the AXI MCDMA component.
contains the base address of the AxiEthernet device

simplesect.para: XST_FAILURE to indicate failure, otherwise it will return XST_SUCCESS.

AxiMcdma hardware must be initialized before initializing AxiEthernet. Since AxiMcdma reset line is connected to the AxiEthernet reset line, a reset of AxiMcdma hardware during its initialization would reset AxiEthernet.

briefdescription.para: This function will send a ARP request packet.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Axi Ethernet component.
is a pointer to the instance of the Dma component.
is the MCDMA Channel number to be operate on.

briefdescription.para: This function will send a Echo request packet.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Axi Ethernet component.
is a pointer to the instance of the Dma component.
is the MCDMA Channel number to be operate on.

briefdescription.para: This function will process the received packet.

detaileddescription.para: This function sends the echo request packet based on the ARP reply packet.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Axi Ethernet component.
is a pointer to the instance of the Dma component.
is the MCDMA Channel number to be operate on.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS is returned when an echo reply is received. Otherwise, XST_FAILURE is returned.
This assumes MAC does not strip padding or CRC.

memberdef.argsstring: (XAxiEthernet *AxiEthernetInstancePtr, XMcdma *DmaInstancePtr, u8 ChanId, UINTPTR TxFrame, u32 len)
memberdef.name: XAxienet_Send

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the checksum and returns a 16 bit result.

parameterdescription.para: is a 16 bit pointer for the data to which checksum is to be calculated.
is the starting location of the data from which the checksum has to be calculated.
is the number of halfwords(16 bits) to which checksum is to be calculated.

simplesect.para: It returns a 16 bit checksum value.
This can also be used for calculating checksum. The ones complement of this return value will give the final checksum.

memberdef.argsstring: (u16 *LhsPtr, u16 *RhsPtr, int LhsLoc, int RhsLoc, int Count)
memberdef.name: CompareData

briefdescription.para: This function checks the match for the specified number of half words.

parameterdescription.para: is a LHS entity pointer.
is a RHS entity pointer.
is a LHS entity location.
is a RHS entity location.
is the number of location which has to compared.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS is returned when both the entities are same, otherwise XST_FAILURE is returned.

briefdescription.para: This function setup the buffer descriptor chain for the Ingress mcdma Channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Dma component.
is a pointer to the instance of the Axi Ethernet component.

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure

briefdescription.para: This function setup the buffer descriptor chain for the Egress Channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Dma component.
is a pointer to the instance of the Axi Ethernet component.

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure

briefdescription.para: This function is the main function of the Ping Request example in polled mode.

simplesect.para: XST_FAILURE to indicate failure, otherwise it will return XST_SUCCESS after sending specified number of packets as defined in "NUM_OF_PING_REQ_PKTS" .

briefdescription.para: This file contains a Axi Ethernet MCDMA Ping request example in polled mode.

detaileddescription.para: This example will generate a ping request for the specified IP address.
The local IP address is set to 10.10.70.6. User needs to update LocalIpAddr variable with a free IP address based on the network on which this example is to be run.
The Destination IP address is set to 10.10.70.3. User needs to update DestIpAddress variable with any valid IP address based on the network on which this example is to be run.
The local MAC address is set to 0x000A35030201. User can update LocalMacAddr variable with a valid MAC address. The first three bytes contains the manufacture ID. 0x000A35 is XILINX manufacture ID.
This program will generate the specified number of ping request packets as defined in "NUM_OF_PING_REQ_PKTS".
This example got validated only for SGMII based design's.

listitem.para: SendArpReqFrame demonstrates the way to send the ARP request packets in the polling mode
SendEchoReqFrame demonstrates the way to send the ICMP/ECHO request packets in the polling mode
ProcessRecvFrame demonstrates the way to process the received packet. This function sends the echo request packet based on the ARP reply packet.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.5 adk Initial Release
